note: Verified, dated overnight catalysts in the backtest window (2026-05-12 -> 2026-06-18). A gap is tagged to the session whose overnight move (prior US close -> this US open) reflects the catalyst's reaction. 'aapl_event' = Apple-specific; 'macro' = market-wide. Used to demonstrate a news-aware agent that stands aside on justified repricing instead of blindly fading it. Sources are real and were verified before labeling.

catalysts.description: Apple announces the WWDC 2026 lineup (scheduling news, not the keynote itself).
May ISM Manufacturing print (54, above consensus) + tech-sector rally; macro/sector spillover, not Apple-specific.
May 2026 Employment Situation (jobs report), 8:30am ET pre-open (first-Friday convention).
Overnight reaction to the WWDC 2026 keynote (Mon Jun 8, 1:00pm ET). Apple-specific, justified repricing.
Overnight reaction to the June FOMC decision (Jun 16-17, statement ~2pm ET Jun 17).
